creator: umq@ueo.co.jp
text:
The new version of mail/dkim-milter 2.5.4 has been released.
	Release notes: http://sourceforge.net/project/shownotes.php?release_id=592983

	And the default values in rc script (milterdkim_flag and
	milterdkim_domain) are changed to blank, in favor of the
	configuration file.
	Updating users should check the values in rc.conf.
	(Pointed by: Beat Siegenthaler)

Fix: The patch follows:

cvs diff: Diffing .
How-To-Repeat: 	N/A
